scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @hva/domain && npm run build --workspace @hva/content-schema && npm run build --workspace @hva/api && npm run build --workspace @hva/web
scripts.test:content: npm run build --workspace @hva/domain && npm run build --workspace @hva/content-schema && node scripts/validate-content.mjs
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
